title: tf.nn.space_to_depth  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
SpaceToDepth for tensors of type T.
Rearranges blocks of spatial data, into depth. More specifically,
this op outputs a copy of the input tensor where values from theheightandwidthdimensions are moved to thedepthdimension.
The attrblock_sizeindicates the input block size.
Thedata_formatattr specifies the layout of the input and output tensors
with the following options:
  "NHWC":[ batch, height, width, channels ]"NCHW":[ batch, channels, height, width ]"NCHW_VECT_C":qint8 [ batch, channels / 4, height, width, 4 ]
